header.description: Sends data to AWS Certificate Manager

certificateArn.description: String that contains the ARN of the ACM certificate to be renewed. This must be of the form: arn:aws:acm:region:123456789012:certificate/12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012.

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

certificateStatuses.description: Filter the certificate list by status value

extendedKeyUsage.description: Specify one or more ExtendedKeyUsage extension values

keyTypes.description: Specify one or more algorithms that can be used to generate key pairs

keyUsage.description: Specify one or more KeyUsage extension values
